rationale: stack-pulse-2026-05 PR-01 Phase 1 baseline. PR-01 unified the env *schema* (single Zod source of truth in apps/server/src/env/env.ts; apps/server/src/env.ts is a thin re-export). Raw process.env[…] reads scattered across auth.ts/cors.ts/email/*/obs/* are Phase 2 (a 1-week incremental refactor). Lower this number in any PR that migrates a caller; raise only with an open follow-up issue scheduling the Phase-2 migration. History: 2026-05-07 cleanup migrated getBaseURL/getAdvancedCookieOptions in auth.ts (BETTER_AUTH_URL ×2, REPLIT_DEV_DOMAIN ×2, REPLIT_DOMAINS ×2 collapsed to 1, BETTER_AUTH_CROSS_SITE_COOKIES ×1): net −5, budget 119 → 114. 2026-05-13 ratchet 114 → 117 (+3) absorbs new reads landed via apps/server PRs (auth.ts GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/SECRET + BETTER_AUTH_TRUSTED_NATIVE_SCHEMES) ahead of Phase 2 migration; tracked in the T5 Phase-2 audit follow-up issue. See docs/initiatives/stack-pulse-2026-05/pr-01-unify-env-modules.md and scripts/check-env-single-source.mjs.
